reviews.review_title: Paid for this and it won’t install!!
reviews.review_description: Paid for this and it won’t install!! Scam!

reviews.review_title: A little buggy but not bad
reviews.review_description:
The game is a little buggy in that you may get stuck on some objects, and occasionally the controls are a little bad, but in spite of that its actually quite good. 
The controls merge head looking and left and right steering, but its playable if you stand up. Graphics are OK, and its actually quite immersive, not bad for the price. Its one of those games that you might keep coming back to. 

Coming back to it, the only real issue is the menu system and picking up items when you respawn your weapons and armour are there but not equipped, its not obvious exactly what you do to re-equip them.

I feel like i was robbed of my $3. The concept itself i feel was really cool. So I expected there to be some flaws from how cheap the game was. One thing I noticed right off was the fact that you walk sooooo sloooow through the game, its down right irritating. I can get over the graphics, for $3 they were decent enough for me. Some items you can pick up but it’s unclear as to how to do that. I blew myself up so many times trying to grab stuff. The controls are to where you can turn with the D-pad or turn with the headset. It should only be turn with the headset and move in that direction with the d-pad. Which brings me to my next problem, i got hung up on eeeevvverrryyythiing. The stairs to climb up. Walls. Rocks. I even got stuck ontop of a skeleton. Honestly its not worth $3 till the game is fixed. Im honestly sorry I bought it. If they fixed these things they would definitely get a solid 3 maybe even 4 stars.
